free_text: Spallation products produced by bombardment of
dysprosium with protons of energies 9-87 MeV
Mixture of dysprosium and cupric oxides, mixed
together in roughly a 1:1 atom ratio. Natural as well
X-ray and gamma-ray activities were measured
by a 3 in. x 3 in. NaI(Tl) scintillation counter
connected to a 100-channel pulse height analyser.
